title: Add custom platform logo to all pages

requirements.summary: Replace text-only branding with the custom Luid logo image across the Header component and all three login pages (ClientLogin, MasterLogin, StaffLogin)
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image is served from `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png`
The Header component displays the logo image instead of a text-only brand mark
The ClientLogin page shows the logo above the login form heading
The MasterLogin page shows the logo above the login form heading
The StaffLogin page shows the logo above the login form heading
All existing functionality and styling remain intact

file_operations.description: Replace the existing text-only 'LuidCorporation' branding with an element that displays the generated logo from `frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png`. Reference the image using the src path `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png`. Preserve all existing Header functionality including the role badge, profile button, and logout action. Maintain the neon green aesthetic and glass-panel styling.

Add an element displaying the logo from `frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` above the existing login form heading. Reference the image using `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` as the src. Center the logo and ensure it fits the existing neon green aesthetic. Keep all authentication logic, form fields, and routing behavior unchanged.

Add an element displaying the logo from `frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` above the existing login form heading. Reference the image using `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` as the src. Center the logo and ensure it fits the existing neon green aesthetic. Preserve all authentication logic, form validation, and routing to the master panel.

Add an element displaying the logo from `frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` above the existing login form heading. Reference the image using `/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png` as the src. Center the logo and ensure it fits the existing neon green aesthetic. Keep all staff authentication logic and routing intact.
